title: hedyotis nigricans var. rigidiuscula
intro: Hedyotis nigricans var. rigidiuscula, also known as stiff Indian pink, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hedyotis nigricans var. rigidiuscula include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in the treatment of various infectious diseases. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, with the leaves and stems being harvested for their medicinal properties.
